questionHtml: Write down the integral which can be used to find the area of the shaded region R.
markschemeHtml:
∫070-x250+2x+30 dx                         A1A1


Note: Award A1 for a correct integral, A1 for correct limits in the correct location. Award at most A0A1 if dx is omitted.

 

[2 marks]
